content.rendered:
In order to update new technical features and sharing experiences on Gas Turbine Technology, Centrifugal Compressor, Control system, Solar Turbines and Thuong Thien Technology have conducted the workshop “Solar Turbines Vietnam Technology Day” on the 16th March of 2018 at Intercontinental Saigon hotel, Ho Chi Minh city, Vietnam.

Attending the workshop, there were many technical representatives interested in the subject such as CLJOC, HLJOC, VSP, KNOC, Idemitsu, PTSC-MC, PVE, PV Gas, etc.

On behalf of Solar Turbines Company, Mr. Richard Mundy – Managing Director of Asia-Pacific has emphasized that customers in Vietnam are very important to success of the company. Solar Turbines wants to get closer and understand more about customers in Vietnam. Throughout the workshop, the company hopes that customers in Vietnam will understand more about Gas Turbine Technology and Solar Turbine’s experts can solve all questions of customers.

With the participation of two experienced technical expert speakers Mr. Rainer Kurz – Manager Systems Analysis and Mr. Balaji Venkataraman – Manager of Rotordynamics – Gas Compressor Products, Solar Turbine brought to customers in Vietnam knowledge and lessons in many topics including Centrifugal Compressors, Gas Turbine Technology, Controls, and Solar Customer Services Updates.

The workshop was finished successfully when customers actively participated in the event and together shared experiences in the relating subjects. Solar Turbine commits to serve customers best value and ready to help customers to solve issues anytime.

excerpt.rendered: In order to update new technical features and sharing experiences on Gas Turbine Technology, Centrifugal Compressor, Control system, Solar Turbines and Thuong Thien Technology have conducted the workshop “Solar Turbines Vietnam Technology Day” on the 16th March of 2018 at Intercontinental Saigon hotel, Ho Chi Minh city, Vietnam.
